text:
EXPLANATION: The cited source is a legitimate open-source project and evaluation framework for instruction-following models maintained by the Tatsu Lab. The authors listed in the citation are prominent members of the Tatsu Lab research group associated with the Alpaca project, and the reference is a valid citation of this software project.
LINK: https://github.com/tatsu-lab/alpaca_eval
FOUND_TITLE: AlpacaEval: An Automatic Evaluator of Instruction-following Models
FOUND_AUTHORS: tatsu-lab
FOUND_YEAR: 2023
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
